title: distylium racemosum f. angustifolium
intro: Distylium racemosum f. angustifolium, also known as the Chinese Distylium or Narrow-leaved Distylium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Hamamelidaceae. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Distylium racemosum f. angustifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the production of traditional Chinese medicines such as pills and ointments.
